description: Frequency of fingerprint-related keywords in detective rationales.
analysis: Across 135 detective rationales, the most frequently mentioned fingerprint features are: 'same' (91%), 'paraphrase' (69%), 'structure' (64%), 'identical' (57%), 'style' (56%). This reveals which stylistic dimensions the detective relies on most heavily when distinguishing paraphrasers. Length and structural features appear prominently, suggesting these are the most salient fingerprint dimensions.
